title: NestJS Application Generator
description: Create a NestJS application with ESM, Vitest, and Biome

directory.description: The directory of the new application
directory.x-prompt: Which directory do you want to create the application in?

bundler.description: Build bundler to use (Webpack is recommended for NestJS server-side applications)
bundler.x-prompt: Which bundler would you like to use?

validation.description: Validation library for request validation (Standard Schema support)
validation.x-prompt: Which validation library would you like to use?

tags.description: Add tags to the application (used for linting)

skipPackageJson.description: Do not add dependencies to package.json

strict.description: Enable TypeScript strict mode with all strict checks
